CustomField.description: Forecast amount based on EH Management's formula. Stage 4 - 50%, Stage 5 - 80%, Stage 6/Closed Won - 100%
CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(StageName), "Stage 3 - Develop", Amount *0.5, "Stage 4 - Prove", Amount *0.8, "Stage 5 - Negotiation", Amount *1, "Stage 6 - Implement (Closed)", Amount *1, "Closed Won", Amount *1, "Stage 4 - Objection Handling", Amount *0.5, "Stage 5 - Preferred", Amount *0.8, "Stage 6 - Negotiating/Forecast", Amount *1, 0)
CustomField.label: Amount_Weightage
